category_title: Students with ASD who struggle with emotional regulation and unstructured social interaction
scenario_title: Facing peer disagreement during structured dialogue
minimal_context: Bruce is seated in a circle participating in a CoPI session where participants must agree or disagree with previous speakers' points.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Bruce, the next part of our CoPI session is to listen to the other children who are disagreeing with your point.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Visibly frustrated) I don't want to listen to them.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for them to share their thoughts.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am angry because the other children were disagreeing with me.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please stay in your seat in the circle while they finish speaking.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Bruce, the next part of our CoPI session is to listen to the other children who are disagreeing with your point.

STUDENT: (Visibly frustrated) I don't want to listen to them.

TUTOR: It is time for them to share their thoughts.

STUDENT: I am angry because the other children were disagreeing with me.

TUTOR: Please stay in your seat in the circle while they finish speaking.

STUDENT: (Removes himself from the session)

task.content: Participating in CoPI sessions where participants are required to agree or disagree with previous speakers' points.

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the other children were disagreeing with him
related_quotes: angry because the other children were disagreeing with him

behavior_patterns.condition: When faced with disagreement from peers
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Removed himself from these sessions but always returned of his own volition
related_quotes: angry because the other children were disagreeing with him
